title: Traditional Greek Kleftiko
description: A classic Greek dish of slow-cooked lamb, often served on special occasions. The tender meat falls off the bone and is infused with the flavors of the Mediterranean.
instructions: Rub the lamb shoulder with Greek olive oil, Greek seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb shoulder to a large Dutch oven or a heavy roasting pan.
Add the bitter root vegetables and sprigs of rosemary around the lamb.
Cover the pan with a lid or foil and transfer to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 3-4 hours, or until tender and falling apart.
Remove the lamb from the oven and let it rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing.
Serve the sliced lamb with the roasted root vegetables.
